scope: Robinhood Chain launchpad only; Stake Engine reference excluded

completed.title: Direct RPC fallback for production views
completed.limits: Recent deployment bootstrap is bounded to 100 blocks; durable history requires the hosted indexer.

completed.title: Hosted indexer deployment templates
completed.limits: No provider account was authorized, so no public service URL is claimed.

completed.title: Reviewed V2/V3 DEX quoting and user-signed execution
completed.limits: Production adapters require independently reviewed canonical addresses and runtime hashes.

completed.title: Fast launch review and Quick Buy
completed.limits: No autonomous signing, front-running, sandwiching or anti-bot bypass.

completed.title: Per-token safety scanner
completed.limits: Holder/source evidence depends on configured explorer APIs; honeypot certainty is not claimed.

completed.title: Deployer reputation
completed.limits: Known rug-pull status is unknown unless supplied by a reviewed evidence source.

completed.title: Manipulation warnings
completed.limits: Self, reciprocal, circular and matched-size signals are warnings, not proof.

completed.title: Signed webhook, Discord and Telegram delivery
completed.limits: No user email service is included.

completed.title: Watchlist persistence and event alerts
completed.limits: Browser watchlists are local-only; hosted alerts are operator-configured, not per-user email subscriptions.

completed.title: Responsive UI, real-time Radar and theme support
